# Bluetooth Finder

> Bluetooth Finder is an iOS app that helps you quickly locate lost Bluetooth devices—AirPods, smartwatches, headphones, and other Bluetooth gadgets—using hot & cold guidance and a proximity percentage. Free to download on the App Store; works on iPhone with iOS 17.1 or later.

## Main Page

- Home: https://bluetoothfinderapp.com/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6756609274

## Key Facts

- App name: Bluetooth Finder (Bluetooth Finder App)
- Platform: iOS (iPhone), requires iOS 17.1 or later
- App size: 50.9 MB
- Age rating: 4+
- Download: Free (optional in-app purchases)
- Device types: AirPods, smartwatches, headphones, speakers, and any powered-on Bluetooth device
- Features: Real-time scan, hot & cold guidance, proximity percentage, device info (manufacturer, model, name)
- Use cases: Find lost AirPods at home or on the go, misplaced smartwatches or fitness trackers, headphones and speakers
- Developer: Vladimir Ivakhnenko

## How It Works

1. Download the app from the App Store and open it.
2. Scan for nearby Bluetooth devices and select your lost device.
3. Follow the hot & cold signals (Cold, Warm, Hot, Very Hot) and proximity percentage to locate it.

## Comparison

Bluetooth Finder works with any powered-on Bluetooth device; it does not require prior pairing like Apple Find My. Use it to find AirPods, non-Apple smartwatches, headphones, and other Bluetooth gadgets quickly.

## Contact

- Website: https://bluetoothfinderapp.com/
- Privacy: https://bluetoothfinderapp.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://bluetoothfinderapp.com/terms.html

Last updated: February 2026
